system.title: System Settings
system.description: Manage global application states, toggle payment methods, and enforce security policies across the commerce engine.

maintenance.title: Maintenance Mode
maintenance.description: Take the storefront offline for all users. Admin dashboard remains accessible.

cod.title: Guest COD (Cash on Delivery)
cod.description: Allow unverified users to place orders using COD as a payment method.

blacklist.title: Security Blacklist
blacklist.empty: No phone numbers are currently blacklisted.

audit.title: Settings Audit Trail
audit.description: History of all global configuration changes. This ledger tracks who changed what system toggle and when.

denied.title: Access Denied
denied.message: Your account requires the {permission} permission to access the audit trail. Please contact a Super Admin for authorization.
